Package org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.platform

Class HstDiscoveryService

java.lang.Object
org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.platform.HstDiscoveryService
public class HstDiscoveryService extends Object
HST-aware façade that absorbs config resolution, query building, and request-cache logic. Components become thin: they extract raw HST params, delegate here, and set model/attributes.

Config is resolved via DiscoveryConfigProvider — JVM-lifetime cache with JCR observation-driven invalidation. No per-request JCR reads.

Pixel events are fired asynchronously on cache-miss only (prevents double-firing when multiple components share the same page render).
